'''Fwatna''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Subterrel sector/Legends|Subterrel sector]] near the site where [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] found the abandoned freighter ''[[Spicy Lady]]''. The ship belonged to his [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] associate [[Jarril]]. This also led to the discovery of [[Kueller|Dolph]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Rebellion]]''

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
